beforeAfterTeaser.title: A real Sydney transformation that shows what better joinery planning can do.
beforeAfterTeaser.text: This Willoughby kitchen shows how thoughtful layout, detailing and finish selection can completely change the feel and function of a home. Explore the projects page to see more before-and-after work across kitchens, wardrobes, laundries and broader joinery-led renovation scopes.

serviceAreasTeaser.title: Sydney-wide service across established homes and premium residential areas.
serviceAreasTeaser.intro: We work across Sydney, including the Lower North Shore, Eastern Suburbs, Inner West, Hills District and surrounding suburbs, delivering custom joinery, kitchen renovations and renovation-led cabinetry with a tailored approach.
serviceAreasTeaser.bodyText: Start with our main service areas page or jump straight into suburb pages for selected locations below.
